title: Planning Recovery Ambiguity Audit
goal: Audit the routine planning recovery questions for ordinary agent work.
Identify the cheapest current owner surface for each question.
Call out the main repeated ambiguity or reread pressure that still remains.
non_goals: Promote follow-on work out of this review.

review_mode.review question: Which current surfaces answer the ordinary planning recovery questions cheapest, and where does prose reread pressure still remain?

findings.title: The recovery questions are cheap now, but the fallback boundary is still split across two prose owners
findings.summary: The compact planning summary already answers the ordinary recovery questions cheaply, but the repo still teaches the fallback path in both `docs/default-path-contract.md` and `.agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/README.md`, and both still refer readers back to raw `TODO.md` or execplan prose as secondary fallback. That split leaves a small but repeated reread pressure: agents still have to compare prose owners before trusting the compact field map.
findings.evidence: `docs/default-path-contract.md` lists the four routine recovery questions and says to fall back to prose only when the compact summary is ambiguous; `.agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/README.md` repeats the same meaning boundary and restart guidance; `agentic-planning-bootstrap summary --format json` already exposes the compact fields that answer the questions directly.
findings.risk if unchanged: Routine recovery keeps paying a comparison tax, especially for the boundary between follow-on ownership and slice residue, because the answer is spread across two prose docs plus the summary output.
findings.suggested action: Add one shared compact question-to-owner table in the default path contract, then trim the duplicate fallback explanation in `.agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/README.md` to a short pointer.
findings.promotion trigger: the next planning-surface clarity cleanup edit

recommendation.promote: one compact question-to-surface map that keeps routine recovery on the summary path.
recommendation.defer: broader planning-surface reshaping until another repeated ambiguity appears.
recommendation.dismiss: raw planning prose as the default restart path.
